attributes.title: DNS — Total Queries
attributes.description: Total Zeek DNS queries (event.dataset=dns) in range. MITRE TA0011/T1071.004 Application Layer Protocol: DNS.
attributes.visState: {"title": "DNS \u2014 Total Queries", "type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "type": "metric", "metric": {"percentageMode": false, "useRanges": false, "colorSchema": "Green to Red", "metricColorMode": "None", "colorsRange": [{"from": 0, "to": 10000}], "labels": {"show": true}, "invertColors": false, "style": {"bgFill": "#000", "bgColor": false, "labelColor": false, "subText": "", "fontSize": 48}}}}

attributes.title: DNS — NXDOMAIN Responses
attributes.description: Count of NXDOMAIN responses. MITRE TA0011/T1568.002 Domain Generation Algorithms — NXDOMAIN bursts from one host suggest DGA C2. False positives: typos and stale config produce steady low NXDOMAIN.
attributes.visState: {"title": "DNS \u2014 NXDOMAIN Responses", "type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "type": "metric", "metric": {"percentageMode": false, "useRanges": false, "colorSchema": "Green to Red", "metricColorMode": "None", "colorsRange": [{"from": 0, "to": 10000}], "labels": {"show": true}, "invertColors": false, "style": {"bgFill": "#000", "bgColor": false, "labelColor": false, "subText": "", "fontSize": 48}}}}

attributes.title: DNS — Unique Clients
attributes.description: Distinct DNS client IPs (cardinality source.ip). MITRE TA0043/T1590.
attributes.visState: {"title": "DNS \u2014 Unique Clients", "type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "cardinality", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "source.ip"}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "type": "metric", "metric": {"percentageMode": false, "useRanges": false, "colorSchema": "Green to Red", "metricColorMode": "None", "colorsRange": [{"from": 0, "to": 10000}], "labels": {"show": true}, "invertColors": false, "style": {"bgFill": "#000", "bgColor": false, "labelColor": false, "subText": "", "fontSize": 48}}}}

attributes.title: DNS — Unique Domains
attributes.description: Distinct queried domains (cardinality dns.question.name). A sudden rise can indicate DGA or scanning.
attributes.visState: {"title": "DNS \u2014 Unique Domains", "type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "cardinality", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "dns.question.name"}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "type": "metric", "metric": {"percentageMode": false, "useRanges": false, "colorSchema": "Green to Red", "metricColorMode": "None", "colorsRange": [{"from": 0, "to": 10000}], "labels": {"show": true}, "invertColors": false, "style": {"bgFill": "#000", "bgColor": false, "labelColor": false, "subText": "", "fontSize": 48}}}}

attributes.title: DNS — Queries Over Time by Type
attributes.description: DNS query volume over time split by record type (dns.question.type). MITRE TA0011/T1071.004. False positives: A/AAAA/HTTPS dominate normally.
attributes.visState: {"title": "DNS \u2014 Queries Over Time by Type", "type": "histogram", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "scaleMetricValues": false, "interval": "auto", "drop_partials": false, "min_doc_count": 1, "extended_bounds": {}}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "group", "params": {"field": "dns.question.type", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 8, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}], "params": {"type": "histogram", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "Query Count"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "histogram", "mode": "stacked", "data": {"label": "Count", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": true}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {"show": false}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.title: DNS — Top Queries (Tag Cloud)
attributes.description: Most frequently queried domains (dns.question.name); word size scales with count. MITRE TA0011/T1071.004 DNS. False positives: CDN/telemetry (apple-dns, spotify, microsoft) dominate — expected.
attributes.visState: {"title": "DNS \u2014 Top Queries (Tag Cloud)", "type": "tagcloud", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "dns.question.name", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 40, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}], "params": {"scale": "linear", "orientation": "single", "minFontSize": 14, "maxFontSize": 60, "showLabel": true}}

attributes.title: DNS — Top Client IPs (Tag Cloud)
attributes.description: Clients issuing the most DNS queries (source.ip). MITRE TA0043/T1590. False positives: internal resolvers/forwarders dominate.
attributes.visState: {"title": "DNS \u2014 Top Client IPs (Tag Cloud)", "type": "tagcloud", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "source.ip", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 30, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}], "params": {"scale": "linear", "orientation": "single", "minFontSize": 14, "maxFontSize": 60, "showLabel": true}}

attributes.title: DNS — Query Type Distribution
attributes.description: Distribution of DNS record types queried (dns.question.type). MITRE TA0011/T1071.004. Unusual TXT/NULL volume can indicate DNS tunnelling (T1071.004).
attributes.visState: {"title": "DNS \u2014 Query Type Distribution", "type": "pie", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "dns.question.type", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 12, "otherBucket": true, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}], "params": {"type": "pie", "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "isDonut": true, "labels": {"show": true, "values": true, "last_level": true, "truncate": 100}}}

attributes.title: DNS — Response Code Distribution
attributes.description: DNS response codes (dns.response_code). MITRE TA0011/T1568.002 — elevated NXDOMAIN suggests DGA. False positives: SERVFAIL from upstream resolver issues.
attributes.visState: {"title": "DNS \u2014 Response Code Distribution", "type": "pie", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "dns.response_code", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 10, "otherBucket": true, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}], "params": {"type": "pie", "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "isDonut": true, "labels": {"show": true, "values": true, "last_level": true, "truncate": 100}}}

attributes.title: DNS — Queries by Client over Time (Heat Map)
attributes.description: Heat map of DNS query volume per client over time — a bright row is a host with bursty/anomalous resolution (DGA, beaconing, or noisy telemetry). MITRE TA0011/T1071.004, TA0043/T1590. False positives: update/telemetry hosts produce dense rows.
attributes.visState: {"title": "DNS \u2014 Queries by Client over Time (Heat Map)", "type": "heatmap", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "interval": "auto", "min_doc_count": 1}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "group", "params": {"field": "source.ip", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 15, "otherBucket": false, "missingBucket": false}}], "params": {"type": "heatmap", "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "enableHover": false, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "colorsNumber": 5, "colorSchema": "Greens", "setColorRange": false, "colorsRange": [], "invertColors": false, "percentageMode": false, "valueAxes": [{"show": false, "id": "ValueAxis-1", "type": "value", "scale": {"type": "linear", "defaultYExtents": false}, "labels": {"show": false, "rotate": 0, "overwriteColor": false, "color": "black"}}]}}

attributes.title: DNS — Top Domains by Client
attributes.description: Top queried domains broken down by client (dns.question.name × source.ip). MITRE TA0011/T1071.004.
attributes.visState: {"title": "DNS \u2014 Top Domains by Client", "type": "table", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "dns.question.name", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 20, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "source.ip", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 3, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}], "params": {"perPage": 15, "showPartialRows": false, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false, "sort": {"columnIndex": null, "direction": null}, "showTotal": true, "totalFunc": "sum", "percentageCol": "", "showToolbar": true}}

attributes.title: DNS — Top NXDOMAIN Domains
attributes.description: Domains most often returning NXDOMAIN — DGA/typosquat triage list. MITRE TA0011/T1568.002 Domain Generation Algorithms. False positives: dead CDNs and stale internal names.
attributes.visState: {"title": "DNS \u2014 Top NXDOMAIN Domains", "type": "table", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "dns.question.name", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 20, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "source.ip", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 3, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}], "params": {"perPage": 15, "showPartialRows": false, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false, "sort": {"columnIndex": null, "direction": null}, "showTotal": true, "totalFunc": "sum", "percentageCol": "", "showToolbar": true}}

attributes.title: DNS — Query Log (Discover)
attributes.description: Timestamped Zeek DNS query log. MITRE TA0011/T1071.004 Application Layer Protocol: DNS. False positives: CDN/telemetry resolution is routine.

attributes.title: SURU — DNS Visibility (Zeek)
attributes.description: Zeek-observed DNS resolution from suru-zeek-* (event.dataset=dns). MITRE: TA0011 Command and Control (T1071.004 DNS, T1568.002 Domain Generation Algorithms), TA0043 Reconnaissance (T1590). False positives: CDN/telemetry domains dominate query and client panels; cross-reference NXDOMAIN bursts and unusual record types (TXT/NULL) before escalating.
